prompt: Create a vertical smartphone-style food photo of homemade takoyaki served on a plain round white ceramic plate on a gray stainless-steel kitchen counter. The takoyaki is piled high and looks glossy and appetizing, covered with dark brown takoyaki sauce, thick pale yellow mayonnaise zigzags, fluttery bonito flakes, green aonori seasoning, and sliced green onion rings spilling over the plate edge. Add cute hand-drawn white doodle illustrations over the photo as if drawn with a marker: exactly 2 round octopus mascot characters wearing festival headbands, one large octopus peeking from behind the upper right of the plate holding 1 takoyaki skewer and looking surprised, and one smaller octopus at the lower left leaning against the plate; include exactly 2 small doodled takoyaki balls, one circled near the bottom center of the plate and one smiling ball at the lower right. Surround the dish with playful white outline decorations, including approximately 11 stars, 5 hearts, 3 flower-like puffs, 4 small bubbles or circles, and several motion/splash marks, all floating around the food without covering the main toppings. Keep the lighting casual and realistic, with shallow phone-camera perspective from slightly above, warm indoor color, crisp food texture, and a whimsical cozy social-media aesthetic. No printed text or labels.
